name: multi_edit_file
description: Apply multiple edits atomically to one or more files. All edits succeed or all are rolled back. Supports str_replace, insert (by line number), and delete_lines. Use dry_run=true to preview changes without applying. Returns unified diff and before/after content for each file. Set show_diff=true to present the diff to the user in the HUD for review — they can Accept or Reject, and you receive a [SYSTEM] message with their decision. The edits are applied immediately; show_diff is for user visibility and feedback, not gating.

edits.description: Array of file edits to apply atomically

operations.description: Operations to apply to this file

old_string.description: For str_replace: exact text to find

line.description: For insert: line number to insert after (0 = beginning)

start.description: For delete_lines: first line to delete (1-indexed)

end.description: For delete_lines: last line to delete (1-indexed, inclusive)

dry_run.description: If true, return diff without applying changes (default: false)

show_diff.description: If true, automatically show the diff in the HUD panel (default: false)
